calendar.matters:
Petition To Confirm Settlement Agreement; Enter Order Quieting Title; And To Dispense With Notice To Certain Individuals
Off Calendar Feb-23-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Charles Triay for Gina Sargent.
Patricia Fyfe appeared by telephone for Rosalinda Padilla.

The Court noted that the language in the order is different from what is in the petition and that notice is waived. The Court also advised Counsel that it will only approve the settlement agreement with the exception that the monies that go to Gina will go in her capacity as Administrator and stated that the property will be ordered an asset of the Trust. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Settlement Agreement, etc. (subject to receipt and review of a revised order). Mr. Triay is to prepare the order and provide it to Ms. Fyfe.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

Petition To Confirm Settlement Agreement; Enter Order Quieting Title; And To Dispense With Notice To Certain Individuals
Off Calendar Jan-30-2017 Continued To Feb-08-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Confirm Settlement Agreement; Enter Order Quieting Title; And To Dispense With Notice To Certain Individuals
Off Calendar Dec-30-2016 Continued To Jan-30-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Charles Triay for Gina Sargent. Patricia Fife for Rosalinda Padilla.

The Court asked about the amendment for signature in regards to the settlement agreement. Mr. Triay stated that it was filed Friday, signed in the capacity of personal representative in her father's estate and that they submitted a revised order which includes the clause regarding distribution. The Court took the Petition to Confirm Settlement Agreement, etc., under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

Petition To Confirm Settlement Agreement; Enter Order Quieting Title; And To Dispense With Notice To Certain Individuals
Off Calendar Nov-21-2016 Continued To Dec-05-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-04-2016 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-25-2015 Continued To Apr-04-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets, Removal Of Trustee, Quiet Title, And Other Grounds
Off Calendar Oct-19-2015 Continued To Dec-07-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Hill for Gina Sargent. Patricia Fyfe for (trustee) Rosalinda Padilla.

Mr. Hill reported that a couple of the issues were resolved, that they still have a couple of outstanding issues and requested that the trial date in December be continued to March. Ms. Fyfe stated her agreement with Mr. Hill. The Court advised counsel that a motion would need to be filed in department 206 for the continuance. The status on mediation is off calendar and the petition for order confirming trust assets, etc., is transferred to department 206 for trial.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets, Removal Of Trustee, Quiet Title, And Other Grounds
Off Calendar Aug-31-2015 Continued To Oct-19-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Hill for (petitioner) Gina Sargent. Patricia Fyfe for (trustee) Rosalinda Padilla.

Ms. Fyfe reported that they are planning another mediation session and that they do not need an additional status date. The Court stated that they are confirmed for trial on 12/7/15, that it may settle prior to that date and requested that the court be notified by October 19, 2015 as to the status. The petition for order confirming trust assets, etc., was continued to October 19, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets, Removal Of Trustee, Quiet Title, And Other Grounds
Off Calendar Aug-17-2015 Continued To Aug-31-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets, Removal Of Trustee, Quiet Title, And Other Grounds
Off Calendar May-18-2015 Continued To Aug-17-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Hill for (Petitioner) Gina Sargent. Patricia Fyfe for and with (Trustee) Rosalinda Padilla.

Ms. Fyfe reported that they are still trying to mediate and that they want the appraisal from the probate referee prior to resuming mediation. The matter was referred to the department of the Presiding Judge (206) to be set for trial on December 7, 2015, at 9:30 a.m. in the event mediation is not successful (order for the same signed in open court). The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets, etc., was continued to August 17, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on the mediation.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Robles. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets, Removal Of Trustee, Quiet Title, And Other Grounds

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets, Removal Of Trustee, Quiet Title, And Other Grounds
Off Calendar Aug-20-2014 Continued To Nov-12-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Hill for and with Gina Sargent. Patricia Fyfe for Rosalinda Padilla.

The Court informed Counsel that there are procedural issues and standing issues. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than November 7, 2014. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by November 7, 2014. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets, etc. was continued to and the Parties are to return on November 12, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. Counsel was instructed to review the Probate Examiner's notes and address the issues that have been raised.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets, Removal Of Trustee, Quiet Title, And Other Grounds
Off Calendar Jul-28-2014 Continued To Aug-20-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets, Removal Of Trustee, Quiet Title, And Other Grounds
Off Calendar Jun-16-2014 Continued To Jul-28-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets, Removal Of Trustee, Quiet Title, And Other Grounds
Off Calendar Mar-03-2014 Continued To Jun-16-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Hill for Gina Sargent.

The Court noted that Ms. Fyfe was not present. Mr. Hill agreed that Trust activity is definitely in San Francisco, stated that he has done a document subpoena to the former attorney for his records, that the deed is very ambiguous and addressed the issue of notice. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets, etc. was continued to June 16, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for additional notice to be provided.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
